3062750.name: DUCKS
3062750.description:
About The Game

DUCKS is a casual clicker game featuring cute ducks. Collect more ducks by playing, crafting and trading with other duck enthusiasts.

Features

- exchange system - you will be able to echange ducks from your Steam inventory into other ducks of varying rarity
- seasonal ducks - more ducks will be able to drop in the upcoming weeks and months
- trading with other players using the Steam Marketplace

DUCKS

- we are not using AI for any process in making the ducks
- all of the ducks are made us or our artist friends

Remember to take a good care of your ducks... or else...
3062750.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
